component.name: Naturtag
component.summary: Tag your nature photos with iNat taxonomy and observation metadata

description.p: Naturtag is a desktop application for tagging nature photos with metadata from iNaturalist. It reads observation and taxonomy data from iNaturalist and writes standard EXIF/XMP/IPTC tags to your local image files, making them browsable/searchable by taxonomy.

ul.li: Tag photos with iNaturalist observation and/or taxonomy data
Browse and search observations and taxonomy
Supports JPEG, PNG, and RAW formats, plus sidecars

screenshot.caption: Photo tagger: select and tag observation photos
Taxon search: browse and search the taxonomy tree
Observation browser: browse synced iNaturalist observations
